column1: # Claim 1 phase 2 — master-TF BINDING vs master-TF LOCI, mm10 MEF->mES, 2026-07-14
# Endpoints: CLEAN GSE201577 (same clean driver contracts as phase 1). Confound: |dATPM|, signed for opening/closing.
#   JGES binding  = GSE199612 CUT&Tag (Sall4,Jdp2,Glis1,Esrrb), lab's own paper, native mm10, WT samples,
#                   top-decile-per-factor over clean union; union=>=1 factor (15875), core2=>=2 factors (8878).
#   master-TF loci= cis-regulatory regions of 26 core pluripotency TF genes (refGene mm10):
#   H3K27ac       = GSE199612 H3K27ac CUT&Tag (D0,D7); active=D7 top quartile; activated=D7 high & gain vs D0.
# Report AUROC/CI/fold, not perm-p. "opening"/"closing" = signed-dATPM restricted + magnitude-matched.
